Flight Deck Training

Aviation Callsign Dictation

Listen first, answer fast, and keep the rhythm through a 10-callsign round. The page now centers the transmission, the answer moment, and the feedback loop instead of feeling like a settings form with audio controls.

Quick Start

Listen. Answer. Continue.

Recommended setup: General Aviation, typed answers, mixed English, 1.20x, radio tone on.

One round is 10 callsigns with live streak and accuracy tracking.

Mode General Aviation
Progress 0 / 10
Streak 0
Accuracy 0%

Practice Setup

Quick controls

Keep the main path simple. The essential choices stay visible here, and the extra tuning lives in advanced settings.

Advanced settings

General Aviation and Custom Letters use the custom letter pool when letters are generated.

Current mode General Aviation Round 1 / 10
Voice Mixed English • 1.20x • Radio

Ready

Ready for your first callsign?

Start the round to hear the first transmission. Replay stays available after each playback, and the answer stays hidden unless you reveal it.

Answer Hidden

Spoken phrase stays hidden during practice.

Your Answer

Type what you heard.

Start the round, then type the answer and press Enter or Check.

Ready

Ready for your first callsign?

Listen to the transmission, answer it, and use the next prompt to keep the rhythm moving.

Full callsign CA1234

Expected answer: 1234

Pronunciation: Air China twelve thirty four

One round is 10 callsigns.

Round Summary

Session complete

Completed 10 callsigns completed
Accuracy 0% accuracy
Best streak 0

Start another round when you want a fresh set of callsigns.
